messages.content: I want to explore my creative side more. What are some good ways to express creativity?
How wonderful that you want to explore creativity! What forms of creative expression have you tried or been drawn to?
I've done some writing in the past, but I'm interested in trying something more visual or hands-on.
Writing is a great foundation! Visual arts can be really satisfying. Are you drawn to working with colors, shapes, or maybe working with your hands?
